name: Pretty Boy Dam (Gunpowder tailwater)
notes: Parking at dam base; classic Gunpowder tailwater walk-in.

name: Falls Rd / Masemore (Gunpowder Falls)
notes: Masemore Mill lot; wade access both directions.

name: Glencoe / Monkton (Gunpowder Falls)
notes: NCR Trail parking; broad runs and slicks.

name: Loch Raven Reservoir launch
notes: Electric motors only; rental boats seasonally.

name: Savage River tailwater (Mt. Aetna)
notes: Trophy tailwater; catch-and-release artificials only on most of the river.

name: North Branch Potomac (Barnum)
notes: Below Jennings Randolph dam; trophy regs; flows vary with release.
